disclaimer: Snapshot aligned to WHO Disease Outbreak News 2026-DON599 (corrigendum 5 May 2026). WHO reports as of 4 May 2026: seven patients meeting case definitions in the DON (two laboratory-confirmed hantavirus infections and five suspected cases), including three deaths and additional severely ill patients — read the DON for full clinical detail and caveats. Figures change as investigations proceed; this dashboard is not real-time surveillance.

regions.name: WHO DON — Hantavirus cluster linked to cruise ship travel (multi-country; vessel moored off Cabo Verde as of 4 May 2026)
